accepted.reason: Population dynamics normalization and bounded stochastic diffusion are strong probabilistic numeric kernels.
Correlation-driven covariance assembly and correlated complex noise synthesis provide rich numeric patterns.
Method-dispatch loop microkernels are useful for optimization and profiling-oriented training examples.
Likelihood integral and bootstrap transition helpers are solid scientific computing kernels.
Stirling number computation with combinatorial summation captures useful integer arithmetic patterns.
Node geometry utilities and vector-normalization helpers provide practical spatial computation logic.
Sieve of Eratosthenes is a classic high-signal integer loop kernel.
Transition-count accumulation over chunked trajectories is a concise state-modeling kernel.

skipped.reason: Heavy external C++ renderer wrapper with file/graphics integration; low standalone kernel value.
Hardware bus binding and callback plumbing are integration-specific, not ideal unpaired conversion material.
